message:
refactor(host,protocol,sandbox): spawn self-checks as tasks, harden length encoding, add anyhow dep

- doctor.rs: replace futures::future::join_all with fcp_async_core::task::spawn
  for true concurrent execution with proper panic propagation via join handles
- symbol_envelope.rs: replace bare `as u32` with u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX)
  for safe length encoding in derive_sender_subkey, matching the pattern
  used in HolderProof::signable_bytes
- fcp-sandbox/Cargo.toml + Cargo.lock: add anyhow workspace dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@ pedantic = "warn"
 nursery = "warn"
 
 [dependencies]
+anyhow.workspace = true
 fcp-core.workspace = true
 fcp-manifest.workspace = true
 idna = "1.0"
